title: World Border Evolved
description: A mod that adds /worldbordermove, /battleroyale and /kit it is server sided but you can install it on the client for an orange world border when using /worldbordermove
body:
# **WorldBorderEvolved**
Take control of your server and host epic, automated multiplayer events with WorldBorderEvolved! This powerful, server-side mod gives you all the tools you need to create fully automated Battle Royales, Juggernaut matches, and much more, all with simple commands and deep customization.

It's the perfect tool for server owners who want to run fun, engaging, and unique games for their community.

## **Key Features**
👑 Fully Automated Battle Royale (/battleroyale)
Launch a full-scale Battle Royale game with a single command! Create your own unique game modes using easy-to-edit JSON configuration files.

Phased Border Shrinking: Customize every stage of the game, from the border's size and shrink speed to the damage it deals.

Total Automation: The mod can automatically spread players, clear inventories, assign starting kits, set game modes, and manage PVP rules.

Juggernaut Mode: Create an intense "Hunters vs. Hunted" scenario where one super-powered player must survive against everyone else!

## 🔁 **Automatic Event Looping (/autostart)**
Set up a continuous, hands-free loop of events! As soon as one game ends, the next one can begin automatically.

Weighted Randomizer: Add multiple game configs to the auto-start loop and assign each a "weight" to control how often it gets picked. Keep your events fresh and unpredictable!

Simple Toggle: Start and stop the event loop with a single command.

## 🗺️ **Advanced World Border Control (/worldbordermove)**
Go beyond the limits of vanilla commands with precise control over the world border.

Smooth Transitions: Move the border's center to new coordinates over a set time.

Random Movement: Send the border to a new, random location within its current size for a dynamic challenge.

## 🎒**Easy-to-Use Kit System (/kit)**
Quickly set up for any event with a simple and powerful kit system.

Save Inventories: Use /kit create <name> to save a player's entire inventory—including armor and off-hand items—as a kit.

Instant Loadouts: Give any player a saved kit instantly with /kit load <name>.

Deep Customization
JSON Configuration: Every game mode is controlled by an easy-to-edit JSON file. Tweak every variable to create your own signature events.

Custom Status Effects: Want everyone to have Speed II, or want your Juggernaut to have Strength and Resistance? Add any potion effect to players or the Juggernaut directly in the config files!

How it Works
Server-Side: This mod works entirely on the server. Your players do not need to install it to play!

Optional Client: If a player has the mod installed on their client, they will see a custom orange world border. If not, it will appear as the standard green.
